headline: Netflix Raises Prices: How Much You'll Pay Monthly For Major Streaming Platforms

headline: Netflix 'Just Got $2.8 Billion… Turned Around And Raised Prices': Elizabeth Warren Blasts Streaming Giant's Latest Hike
summary: Elizabeth Warren criticized Netflix's latest price hike, arguing it raised subscription costs shortly after receiving a $2.8 billion fee.
